idea.title: Core Drill
idea.hook: Drill core samples through soil tiles to fully reveal the daily buried artefact before charges run out.
idea.prototype: 12x12 top-down grid of 3-depth tiles. Click drills one chunk. Tile-weight icon telegraphs contents. Daily seed picks the buried artefact silhouette (axe/urn/skull/coin). Win at 80% revealed, lose at 0 charges.
idea.why_novel: Layered depth + daily-seed silhouette reveal differs from surface crack-propagation. Charge budget gives turn-based pacing without a clock.
idea.lose_condition: Drill charges hit zero before silhouette reveal reaches 80%

sources.title: procedural chunk destruction
sources.snippet: Chunk-destruction VFX feels great even with simple shape primitives; pair it with reveal mechanics.

sources.title: reveal-loop satisfaction
sources.snippet: Player-driven reveal beats automatic timers — agency on every click.

sources.title: daily-seed artefact theme
sources.snippet: Daily-seed mystery themes give universal hook without language overhead.

synthesizer_brief: Chunk-destruction reveal with daily-seed artefact silhouette; charges budget for non-timer pacing
